articles.title: Cleveland radio host says Cavaliers are ‘scared’ of facing the Celtics in the playoffs
articles.description:
"They don't want to play Boston in the second round because they're scared."

The post Cleveland radio host says Cavaliers are ‘scared’ of facing the Celtics in the playoffs appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Cleveland radio host claims Cavaliers fear facing Celtics in playoffs.
Celtics could meet Cavaliers in the second round of playoffs.
Boston fans may benefit from Cavaliers' hesitation, boosting Celtics' confidence.

articles.title: Where you live in Mass. can shape your electric bill — is yours getting out of control?
articles.description:
Some Massachusetts residents pay half as much for electricity depending on where they live. Are your electric bills getting out of control?

The post Where you live in Mass. can shape your electric bill — is yours getting out of control? appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Residents in Massachusetts face varying electricity costs based on their location.
Some areas pay up to 50% less for electricity than others.
Rising bills could strain budgets for Boston residents, prompting calls for policy changes.

articles.title: Northeastern students rally over lack of communication after recent violence
articles.description:
Following a series of incidents near and on campus, students say the university has failed to provide timely and transparent safety updates.

The post Northeastern students rally over lack of communication after recent violence appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Northeastern students rallied on April 6, 2026, demanding better safety communication from the university.
Recent violence incidents near campus prompted concerns over transparency and timely updates.
Students fear for their safety, urging the university to improve communication protocols.

articles.title: BU president pauses signage policy after Pride flag controversy
articles.description:
The decision follows months of protests and backlash over the removal of three outward-facing Pride flags from campus spaces.

The post BU president pauses signage policy after Pride flag controversy appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: BU president paused new signage policy amid ongoing Pride flag protests.
Three Pride flags were removed, sparking months of backlash from the community.
The decision aims to address concerns from students and local LGBTQ+ advocates.

articles.title: Red Sox complete Sonny Gray trade, send pitching prospect to Cardinals
articles.description:
The November deal that brought Gray to Boston is now complete.

The post Red Sox complete Sonny Gray trade, send pitching prospect to Cardinals appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Red Sox finalize trade for pitcher Sonny Gray from the Cardinals.
Boston sends pitching prospect Patrick Galle to St. Louis as part of the deal.
This trade aims to strengthen the Red Sox pitching rotation for the upcoming season.
